title: Wire commit flow to tx.commit events and cursor ordering
summary: Update the commit pipeline to emit tx.commit events and persist the transaction-aware cursor/state ordering.
outputs: Post-commit state/cursor update aligned to writer pipeline
Commit flow notes updated for semantic resume context
acceptance_criteria: Commit flow emits tx.commit.start before git commit execution.
Commit flow emits tx.commit.done or tx.commit.fail with deterministic payloads.
Post-commit persistence updates materialized state and cursor in the defined order.
Commit events are consistent with transaction lifecycle invariants.

steps.description: Emit tx.commit.start before commit execution with required fields.
Emit tx.commit.done or tx.commit.fail with commit metadata and errors.
Persist materialized transaction state and cursor after commit in the writer pipeline order.

notes: Target commit_manager.py as the primary implementation surface.
Keep event payloads concise and deterministic.
